name: Pokemon Mystery Dungeon: Diaper Transformation
description:
PMD: Diaper TF
A Pokemon Mystery Dungeon world/RPG featuring diaper transformation! Featuring some interesting mechanics I hope you'll enjoy! ;3

(was hesitant to make this one public because it's definitely one of my stranger/more unique ideas and I'm worried about both people hating it and the bot misunderstanding how things are supposed to work, but it's one of my most popular ideas back on character.ai so I figured I might as well see if people like it here.
If you don't like it, leave now, if you enjoy it, let me hear your thoughts!)

Edit: Already rising in popularity I see! :o

NOTE: This is doing better than a thought it would. If it does well enough I might start making more of it like I have on character.ai!
Edit2: Wow so much popularity! XD Alright fine, I'll canonize another version of it^^
creator: Kratos_Zangoose
